instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate warm-up strategy during cold start.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable warm-up mode when Transmission_Oil_Temp is below Warmup_Temp_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp < Warmup_Temp_Threshold THEN Warmup_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp >= Warmup_Temp_Threshold THEN Warmup_Mode = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall delay upshift during warm-up operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase upshift RPM when Warmup_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Warmup_Mode = Enabled THEN Upshift_RPM = Warmup_Upshift_RPM
IF Warmup_Mode = Enabled AND Engine_Speed > Warmup_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable aggressive shifting during warm-up.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit kickdown when Warmup_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Warmup_Mode = Enabled AND Kickdown_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Kickdown

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain lower gears during cold start.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall delay upshift when Transmission_Oil_Temp is below Cold_Temp_Threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp < Cold_Temp_Threshold AND Vehicle_Speed > Min_Warmup_Speed THEN Maintain_LowGear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable warm-up mode once optimal temperature is reached.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable warm-up strategy when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Warmup_Exit_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Warmup_Exit_Temp THEN Warmup_Mode = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Warmup_Exit_Temp THEN Warmup_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable warm-up strategy only when engine is running.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate warm-up logic when Engine_Running_Status equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Running_Status = TRUE AND Transmission_Oil_Temp < Warmup_Temp_Threshold THEN Warmup_Mode = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall avoid gear hunting during warm-up.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall stabilize gear selection when Warmup_Mode equals Enabled.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable warm-up logic only above minimum vehicle speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate warm-up shifting when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Warmup_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed <= Warmup_Speed AND Warmup_Mode = Enabled THEN Maintain_Current_Gear

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable warm-up strategy during transmission faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit warm-up logic when Transmission_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault = TRUE AND Warmup_Mode = Enabled THEN Apply_Normal_Shifting

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall adjust shift thresholds during warm-up operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall increase shift thresholds when Warmup_Mode equals Enabled.

L4_requirements: IF Warmup_Mode = Enabled AND Engine_Speed > Warmup_Upshift_RPM THEN Trigger_Upshift
